aggregation_rule: 5-judge primary; per-judge per-question -> per-judge per-subject mean -> panel mean across {haiku, sonnet, opus, gpt4o, gpt54}

4_3_correct_spec_delta_13globals.estimand: Mean per-subject (C2a_full_spec - C5_baseline) across 13 global subjects (5-judge primary).

4_3_random_derangement_delta_13globals.estimand: Mean per-subject (C2c_wrong_spec_v2 - C5_baseline) across 13 global subjects (5-judge primary). v2 = random derangement seed=42.

4_3_adversarial_derangement_delta_13glob.estimand: Mean per-subject (C2c_wrong_spec - C5_baseline) across 13 global subjects (5-judge primary). The data label C2c_wrong_spec is the v1 fixed adversarial-derangement pairing in scripts/run_global_rerun.py.

4_3_correct_minus_adversarial_gap.estimand: mean(delta_C2a) - mean(delta_C2c_v1) across 13 globals (size of the content effect at the population mean).

4_3_spec_tag_citation_rate_correct_pct.estimand: Pct of correct-spec (C2a_full_spec) responses citing >=1 spec A/P tag, across 9 subjects in spec_activation_analysis.json.

4_3_spec_tag_citation_rate_correct_numer.estimand: Numerator (cited responses) for correct-spec spec-tag citation rate.

4_3_spec_tag_citation_rate_wrong_pct.estimand: Pct of wrong-spec responses citing >=1 spec A/P tag, across 8 globals in spec_activation_analysis.json (Hamerton has C2c_full_wrong_spec rather than C2c_wrong_spec; the paper's 50.0% claim matches the 8-globals-only aggregation, 156/312).

4_3_spec_tag_citation_rate_wrong_numerat.estimand: Numerator for wrong-spec spec-tag citation rate (8 globals).

4_3_wrong_spec_detection_explicit_pct.estimand: Pct of wrong-spec responses classified as 'explicit' mismatch detection.

4_3_wrong_spec_detection_misapply_pct.estimand: Pct of wrong-spec responses that misapplied the wrong spec.

4_3_wrong_spec_detection_hedged_pct.estimand: Pct of wrong-spec responses that hedged implicitly (paper text 'hedged').

4_3_wrong_spec_detection_ambiguous_pct.estimand: Pct of wrong-spec responses that were ambiguous.

4_3_wrong_spec_total_n.estimand: Total wrong-spec responses classified for detection analysis.

4_3_hedging_narrow_C5_pct.estimand: Narrow-rule hedging rate (starts_refusal) for C5 condition across 13 globals.

4_3_hedging_narrow_C2a_pct.estimand: Narrow-rule hedging rate (starts_refusal) for C2a condition across 13 globals.

4_3_hedging_narrow_C4a_pct.estimand: Narrow-rule hedging rate (starts_refusal) for C4a condition across 13 globals.

4_3_hedging_broader_C5_pct.estimand: Broader-rule hedging rate (refusal_ge_1 anywhere) for C5 across 13 globals.

4_3_hedging_broader_C2a_pct.estimand: Broader-rule hedging rate (refusal_ge_1 anywhere) for C2a across 13 globals.

4_3_hedging_broader_C4a_pct.estimand: Broader-rule hedging rate (refusal_ge_1 anywhere) for C4a across 13 globals.

provenance.condition_naming_note: v11 architecture spec §7 lists C2c_wrong_spec as 'random derangement v2'; the actual data label C2c_wrong_spec is the v1 fixed-adversarial-derangement (paper -0.25 number). The v2 random derangement uses condition string C2c_wrong_spec_v2 stored in results/_wrong_spec_v2/. The architecture spec §7 row needs a follow-up correction; this script reads the data labels as truth.
